text: The App Router build is clean. I’m removing the now-empty `pages/` directory tree and doing one final pass on the generated config changes so the workspace reflects the migrated state, not a mixed-router state.

Migrated the app fully to the App Router and removed `pages/` entirely.

The new route structure is under [app/layout.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/layout.tsx:1), [app/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/page.tsx:1), [app/blog/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/page.tsx:1), [app/blog/[id]/page.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/blog/[id]/page.tsx:1), plus [app/not-found.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/not-found.tsx:1) and [app/error.tsx](/home/user/workspace/app/error.tsx:1). I replaced `next/head` with `metadata`/`generateMetadata`, `_app` with the root layout, `_document` font setup with `next/font/google`, `next/router` usage with `Link` and `next/navigation`, and `getServerSideProps` / `getStaticProps` / `getStaticPaths` with async server components, `revalidate`, and `generateStaticParams`.

API routes were migrated to typed App Router route handlers at [app/api/posts/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/route.ts:1) and [app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts](/home/user/workspace/app/api/posts/[id]/route.ts:1). I also added typed shared data helpers in [lib/posts.ts](/home/user/workspace/lib/posts.ts:1) and converted the provider to TypeScript in [components/AppProvider.tsx](/home/user/workspace/components/AppProvider.tsx:1).

Verification: `npm run build` passed successfully. Next also updated [tsconfig.json](/home/user/workspace/tsconfig.json:1) during the build to include `.next/dev/types/**/*.ts`.
